items.title_en: Premier Lacrosse League plans to bring in team owners by 2028 'or soon thereafter,' co-founder says

items.title_zh: 加拿大11岁男孩醒来后发现脸上被蝙蝠击中，死于狂犬病
items.desc_en: Rabies infections are rare in Canada. There have been 28 human deaths due to rabies in the country since 1924.
items.desc_zh: 狂犬病感染在加拿大很少见。自1924年以来，该国已有28人死于狂犬病。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite, Afghans say
items.title_zh: 阿富汗人说，在我们因冻伤失去四肢之前，土耳其警察用铁棍殴打我们
items.desc_en: The young migrants heading to Europe say they were stripped and had their hands tied in freezing temperatures.
items.desc_zh: 前往欧洲的年轻移民表示，他们在严寒中被剥光衣服，双手被绑住。
